update:
Application Design Center is generally available  (GA) , including the following: 
 
 Application Design Center Google Cloud CLI . 
 Design Center API .
You can export Terraform to your code repository. For more information, see  Export Terraform code .
You can set up Application Design Center using a single project boundary. For more information, see  Set up Application Design Center .

Application Design Center  supports  the following components: 
 
 Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) Node Pool 
 GKE Standard Cluster 
 GKE Autopilot Cluster 
 Firestore
You can import Terraform modules to create components  (Preview) . For more information, see  Import components .

You can edit the Terraform code that is generated by your templates and applications. For more information, see the following: 
 
 Design application templates . 
 Manage applications .
Application Design Center  supports  Cloud Run Jobs as a component.
Application Design Center  supports  AlloyDB as a component.
When you create a Cloud SQL component, you can select from a list of  Machine  series and types. For more information, see  Configure Cloud SQL (MySQL)  and  Configure Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL) .

When you create a template, the following field names have been changed: 
 Template name is  Template ID . 
 Display name is now  Template name . 
 For more information, see  Specify template details .
If your deployment fails, error messages are displayed in the  Application details  panel. For more information, see  View application details .
When you create a new application, the  Application scope  is set to  Global  by default. For more information, see  Create an application draft .
You can create a connection between BigQuery and Pub/Sub components. For more information, see  Configure BigQuery in Application Design Center .
Application Design Center is available in  Preview .

Application Design Center  supports  the following components on the design canvas: 
 
 Compute Engine instance template 
 Compute Engine managed instance group 
 Secret Manager 
 Service account 
 BigQuery 
 Bigtable 
 Cloud Run 
 Cloud SQL (MySQL and PostgreSQL) 
 Cloud Storage 
 Cloud Load Balancing (global and regional) 
 Memorystore for Redis 
 Pub/Sub 
 Spanner 
 Vertex AI
